name: SabMuteMessage
short: Send message on mute in a chosen channel. Supports images and audit log info!
description: Send customizable messages to a designated channel when members are muted (via Discord timeout or mute role). Supports multiple message templates with variable substitution ($username, $server, $duration, $moderator, $reason), image attachments, and random template selection. Requires View Audit Log permission for moderator/reason tracking.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing SabMuteMessage. Configure with `[p]sabmutemessage` (or `[p]sabmm`).

This cog saves images set with `[p]sabmutemessage setimage` to data path.

Note: The bot needs **View Audit Log** permission to show moderator and reason in messages.
author: Sablinova (https://github.com/Sablinova)
